prompt:
A small field notebook page and a compact weather-style planning sheet spread on a desk, featuring a clean, icon-based checklist for an aurora outing: a stylized geomagnetic index dial, cloud cover glyphs, and a time-window bar with highlighted segments—none of it readable as text. A warm jacket sleeve draped over the chair and a small headlamp and thermos nearby suggest stepping outside at the right hour.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded 2040s solarpunk aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, realistic paper and plastic textures, no logos, and no readable words or labels. Keep the composition simple and centered so the “aurora plan” reads clearly as a distinct planning artifact.
